metadata.title: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a blueprint design document using the market_lens, ensuring all cross-border chaotic inputs are resolved into a governed, auditable structure with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a blueprint design document using the market_lens, ensuring all cross-border chaotic inputs are resolved into a governed, auditable structure with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Memory engrave prompt is fully compiled and validated.; All chaotic input fields are mapped to structured schema.; Validation gates produce pass/fail logs for audit.; Overwrite policy is respected: no existing sovereign memory is altered without explicit consent.; Output contract is complete and ready for Codex runtime execution.

in_scope.item: Process the chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context, resolve depth_tier_ambiguity, and produce a memory_engrave_prompt that compiles into a blueprint_design_doc with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The artifact must enforce memory safety and overwrite policy.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Memory engrave prompt is fully compiled and validated.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All chaotic input fields are mapped to structured schema.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates produce pass/fail logs for audit.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Overwrite policy is respected: no existing sovereign memory is altered without explicit consent.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Output contract is complete and ready for Codex runtime execution.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.memory_subject: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a blueprint design document using the market_lens, ensuring all cross-border chaotic inputs are resolved into a governed, auditable structure with explicit validation gates.

memory_content.item: Process the chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context, resolve depth_tier_ambiguity, and produce a memory_engrave_prompt that compiles into a blueprint_design_doc with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The artifact must enforce memory safety and overwrite policy.

SRXML_Artifact.overwrite_policy: Do not overwrite existing memory without approval.

verification_gate.item: Memory engrave prompt is fully compiled and validated.
All chaotic input fields are mapped to structured schema.
Validation gates produce pass/fail logs for audit.
Overwrite policy is respected: no existing sovereign memory is altered without explicit consent.
Output contract is complete and ready for Codex runtime execution.

safety_limits.item: All memory writes must be non-destructive unless explicitly authorized by overwrite policy.
Validation gates must be embedded at each stage: input sanitization, ambiguity resolution, compliance check, and final commit.
No external data leakage; all processing must occur within sovereign boundary.
The market_lens must be applied to ensure economic and strategic alignment.
Depth tier ambiguity must be resolved to D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE before engraving.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
